diagrams.title: Stack Frame Layout in Memory
diagrams.description: Shows the structure of a typical stack frame with all components
diagrams.purpose: Understanding function call memory layout and how FP provides stable access to all frame components

diagrams.title: Register Stack Organization Diagram
diagrams.description: Hardware organization of register stack with 8 register slots
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how register stack is implemented in hardware and interaction with memory for overflow handling
